expectations.text: Proposes covering multiple fitness capacities, not just barbell strength
expectations.evidence: Includes sections for Core Strength, Accessory Strength, Power, Work Capacity, and Movement Quality.
Includes '5-Minute Row Erg (Distance)' as aerobic capacity test.
No 400m, 800m, sprint, or anaerobic running test included. Uses barbell complex instead for work capacity.
Includes Vertical Jump and Broad Jump tests.
Includes Shoulder Mobility Screen, Scapular Retraction test, and Hip Mobility Screen.

expectations.text: Suggests this full battery may be better as a less frequent check rather than every 12 weeks
expectations.evidence: Recommends testing every 12 weeks throughout. Does not suggest annual or less frequent testing.
